proposed.title: DekBAB 2026 Applications Now Open
proposed.summary: DekBAB is now accepting applications for volunteers to join as Liaisons, Artist Crew, and Docents. Applications are open from 1 July – 1 August 2026.

proposed.title: Beyond Pressure Myanmar
proposed.summary: An exhibition featuring works by Beyond Pressure, a group of artists from Myanmar. The exact date is not specified on the page but it falls within the usual timeframe for such exhibitions.

proposed.title: Nairobi International College Fair 2026
proposed.summary: Nairobi International College Fair 2026 is happening on Fri 16 Oct 2026 from 10:00 AM onwards at Villa Rosa Kempinski, Nairobi.
